title: Log error kinds as fields
scenario: Logs should capture error category fields without relying on fragile message parsing.
instructions: Define ErrorKind and error_event that records request_id and error_kind.

hints.body: Keep the Structured request logging code active and define ErrorKind and error_event that records request_id and error_kind.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Log error kinds as fields is shown below.

completionExplanation: Log error kinds as fields now extends the active Structured request logging code with log error kind. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
